name: social-media
description: Facebook and Instagram Graph API integration - Post content and retrieve analytics with Human-in-the-Loop approval
author: AI Employee

connect.description: Test connection to Facebook Graph API

post-facebook.description: Post content to Facebook Page (requires approval)
post-facebook.example: /social post-facebook --message "Check out our new AI Employee!" --link https://example.com

link.description: Optional URL to include in post

image_url.description: Optional image URL (must be publicly accessible)

post-facebook.approval_reason: Posts are public and represent the company brand

post-instagram.description: Post photo to Instagram Business Account (requires approval)
post-instagram.approval_reason: Posts are public and represent the company brand

insights.description: Get Facebook Page insights and analytics

weekly-report.description: Generate weekly social media summary report

instagram.description: Instagram Business Account posting and insights
requirements: Instagram Business Account must be connected to Facebook Page
Image URLs must be publicly accessible

approval_workflow.description: All social media posts require Human-in-the-Loop approval
process: Human reviews and moves to /Approved/ or /Rejected/
Approved posts are published via MCP

setup: 3. Generate Page Access Token with required permissions
4. Connect Instagram Business Account to Facebook Page
troubleshooting: If 'not_configured' error, check .env file has all required variables
If token error, generate new long-lived access token at developers.facebook.com
If Instagram fails, verify account is Business Account and connected to Page
Image URLs must be publicly accessible (not localhost) for Instagram

facebook_post.command: /social post-facebook --message "Excited to announce our new AI Employee system is now live! Automating our workflow one task at a time." --link https://aiemployee.local

instagram_post.command: /social post-instagram --message "Behind the scenes: Building the future of work automation 🚀 #AIEmployee #Automation" --image-url "https://cdn.example.com/photos/team.jpg"
